# Configuration

## Config File

Trellis reads configuration from `.trellis/config.yaml`:

```yaml
# Developer identity (auto-generated by init)
developer: alice

# Spec templates directory
templates_dir: .trellis/templates

# Platform settings
platforms:
  - claude
  - cursor
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Description | Default |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| `TRELLIS_DEVELOPER` | Override developer identity | — |
| `TRELLIS_CONFIG_DIR` | Config directory | `.trellis` |
| `TRELLIS_NO_HOOKS` | Disable platform hooks | `false` |
| `TRELLIS_DRY_RUN` | Dry run mode | `false` |

## CLI Flags

### Global Flags

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--help` | Show help |
| `--version` | Show version |
| `--verbose` | Verbose output |

### Init Flags

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--developer, -d` | Developer name (required) |
| `--platform, -p` | Platform(s) to configure |
| `--all` | Configure all supported platforms |
| `--claude` | Claude Code platform |
| `--cursor` | Cursor platform |
| `--codex` | Codex platform |
| `--devin` | Devin platform |
| `--windsurf` | Devin platform (alias) |
| `--zcode` | ZCode platform |

### Task Flags

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--task, -t` | Task name for context operations |
| `--phase, -f` | Phase (implement/check/research) |

## Platform Configuration

Each platform has its own config directory:

| Platform | Config Dir | Class |
|----------|------------|-------|
| Claude Code | `.claude/` | Push-based |
| Cursor | `.cursor/` | Push-based |
| Codex | `.codex/` | Pull-based |
| Copilot | `.github/copilot/` | Pull-based |
| Devin | `.devin/` | Agentless |
| ZCode | `.zcode/` | Push-based |
| ... | ... | ... |

### Platform Classes

- **Push-based**: Agent runs in your terminal, Trellis hooks trigger automatically
- **Pull-based**: Agent pulls context from files, Trellis generates agent/skill definitions
- **Agentless**: No AI agent, Trellis generates workflow + skill files
